languages.original_text: "That's the beauty of it — I don't know!" {n}Eogunn says this delightedly, as if not knowing something is an intriguing novelty for him.{/n} "Ahem, allow me to specify. It includes objects of mostly regular forms — cubes, spheres, cylinders — made of unknown black stone or metal. Many are covered in glyphs or patterns that cannot be deciphered. Fascinating trinkets that I have spent years studying, but have never progressed beyond flimsy theories that cannot be confirmed experimentally."

languages.text: "В этом вся ее прелесть — я не знаю!" {n}Эоганн говорит это восторженно, словно незнание чего-либо для него интересная диковинка.{/n} "Кхм, позвольте конкретизировать. В нее входят объекты преимущественно правильных формы — кубы, сферы, цилиндры — изготовленные из неизвестного черного камня или металла. Многие покрыты глифами или орнаментами, которые невозможно расшифровать. Занимательные безделушки, за изучением которых я провел годы, но так и не продвинулся дальше шатких теорий, которые невозможно подтвердить опытным путем".

languages.text: «Eso es lo más interesante: ¡no lo sé!». {n}Eogunn realiza esta afirmación con deleite, como si desconocer algo fuera realmente algo novedoso y emocionante para él.{/n} «Ejem, permítame explicarlo. Incluye objetos de formas generalmente regulares: cubos, esferas, cilindros... creados a partir de material negro mineral o metálico desconocido. Son artilugios fascinantes a los que he dedicado años de estudio, y sin embargo nunca he obtenido de ellos más que teorías endebles que no pueden confirmarse de forma empírica».
languages.original_text: "That's the beauty of it — I don't know!" {n}Eogunn says this delightedly, as if not knowing something is an intriguing novelty for him.{/n} "Ahem, allow me to specify. It includes objects of mostly regular forms — cubes, spheres, cylinders — made of unknown black stone or metal. Many are covered in glyphs or patterns that cannot be deciphered. Fascinating trinkets that I have spent years studying, but have never progressed beyond flimsy theories that cannot be confirmed experimentally."

traits.locale_text: «Eso es lo más interesante: ¡no lo sé!». {n}Eogunn realiza esta afirmación con deleite, como si desconocer algo fuera realmente algo novedoso y emocionante para él.{/n} «Ejem, permítame explicarlo. Incluye objetos de formas generalmente regulares: cubos, esferas, cilindros... creados a partir de material negro mineral o metálico desconocido. Son artilugios fascinantes a los que he dedicado años de estudio, y sin embargo nunca he obtenido de ellos más que teorías endebles que no pueden confirmarse de forma empírica».

languages.text: “妙就妙在——我也不知道！”{n}伊奥贡愉快地说道，仿佛“不知道”本身就是一种新奇有趣的体验。{/n}“咳咳，容我补充一下。那些东西大多是规则的几何形状——立方体、球体、圆柱体——由未知的黑石或金属制成。表面覆盖着无法破译的符号或图案。我研究这些迷人的小玩意儿很多年了，但始终停留在无法用实验验证的假说阶段。”
languages.original_text: "That's the beauty of it — I don't know!" {n}Eogunn says this delightedly, as if not knowing something is an intriguing novelty for him.{/n} "Ahem, allow me to specify. It includes objects of mostly regular forms — cubes, spheres, cylinders — made of unknown black stone or metal. Many are covered in glyphs or patterns that cannot be deciphered. Fascinating trinkets that I have spent years studying, but have never progressed beyond flimsy theories that cannot be confirmed experimentally."

traits.locale_text: “妙就妙在——我也不知道！”{n}伊奥贡愉快地说道，仿佛“不知道”本身就是一种新奇有趣的体验。{/n}“咳咳，容我补充一下。那些东西大多是规则的几何形状——立方体、球体、圆柱体——由未知的黑石或金属制成。表面覆盖着无法破译的符号或图案。我研究这些迷人的小玩意儿很多年了，但始终停留在无法用实验验证的假说阶段。”

languages.text: « C'est là toute sa beauté : je n'en ai pas la moindre idée ! » {n}Eogunn prononce ses mots avec la plus grande joie, comme si ce sentiment d'ignorance lui était incroyablement nouveau.{/n} « Pardon, je vais me montrer plus précis. On y trouve des objets de formes généralement classiques, cubes, sphères ou cylindres, dans un métal ou une pierre noire d'origine inconnue. La plupart sont recouverts de glyphes ou de motifs indéchiffrables. J'ai passé des années à étudier ces fascinantes babioles, sans jamais dépasser le stade de théories bancales impossibles à confirmer empiriquement. »
languages.original_text: "That's the beauty of it — I don't know!" {n}Eogunn says this delightedly, as if not knowing something is an intriguing novelty for him.{/n} "Ahem, allow me to specify. It includes objects of mostly regular forms — cubes, spheres, cylinders — made of unknown black stone or metal. Many are covered in glyphs or patterns that cannot be deciphered. Fascinating trinkets that I have spent years studying, but have never progressed beyond flimsy theories that cannot be confirmed experimentally."

traits.locale_text: « C'est là toute sa beauté : je n'en ai pas la moindre idée ! » {n}Eogunn prononce ses mots avec la plus grande joie, comme si ce sentiment d'ignorance lui était incroyablement nouveau.{/n} « Pardon, je vais me montrer plus précis. On y trouve des objets de formes généralement classiques, cubes, sphères ou cylindres, dans un métal ou une pierre noire d'origine inconnue. La plupart sont recouverts de glyphes ou de motifs indéchiffrables. J'ai passé des années à étudier ces fascinantes babioles, sans jamais dépasser le stade de théories bancales impossibles à confirmer empiriquement. »

languages.text: "Das ist das Schöne daran ... ich weiß es nicht!" {n}Eogunn sagt das mit einer Freude, als wäre es für ihn eine faszinierende Neuheit, etwas nicht zu wissen.{/n} "Ähm, lasst mich erklären. Es umfasst Objekte von meist normaler Form ... Würfel, Kugeln, Zylinder ... aus unbekanntem schwarzem Stein oder Metall. Viele sind mit Glyphen oder Mustern bedeckt, die nicht entschlüsselt werden können. Faszinierende Kleinode, die ich jahrelang studiert habe, allesamt fadenscheinige Theorien, die sich experimentell nicht belegen lassen."
languages.original_text: "That's the beauty of it — I don't know!" {n}Eogunn says this delightedly, as if not knowing something is an intriguing novelty for him.{/n} "Ahem, allow me to specify. It includes objects of mostly regular forms — cubes, spheres, cylinders — made of unknown black stone or metal. Many are covered in glyphs or patterns that cannot be deciphered. Fascinating trinkets that I have spent years studying, but have never progressed beyond flimsy theories that cannot be confirmed experimentally."

Es umfasst Objekte von meist normaler Form ... Würfel, Kugeln, Zylinder ... aus unbekanntem schwarzem Stein oder Metall. Viele sind mit Glyphen oder Mustern bedeckt, die nicht entschlüsselt werden können. Faszinierende Kleinode, die ich jahrelang studiert habe, allesamt fadenscheinige Theorien, die sich experimentell nicht belegen lassen."

languages.text: 「そこがいいんだ。」{n}エオガンは、まるで何かを知らないことが彼にとって興味深い新奇なことであるかのように、嬉しそうにそう言う。{/n}「エヘン、具体的に説明しよう。立方体、球体、円柱など、ほとんどが規則的な形をしている。多くはグリフや解読不可能なパターンで覆われている。私は何年もかけて研究してきたが、実験的に確認できない薄っぺらな理論の域を出ることはなかった」
languages.original_text: "That's the beauty of it — I don't know!" {n}Eogunn says this delightedly, as if not knowing something is an intriguing novelty for him.{/n} "Ahem, allow me to specify. It includes objects of mostly regular forms — cubes, spheres, cylinders — made of unknown black stone or metal. Many are covered in glyphs or patterns that cannot be deciphered. Fascinating trinkets that I have spent years studying, but have never progressed beyond flimsy theories that cannot be confirmed experimentally."

traits.locale_text: 「そこがいいんだ。」{n}エオガンは、まるで何かを知らないことが彼にとって興味深い新奇なことであるかのように、嬉しそうにそう言う。{/n}「エヘン、具体的に説明しよう。立方体、球体、円柱など、ほとんどが規則的な形をしている。多くはグリフや解読不可能なパターンで覆われている。私は何年もかけて研究してきたが、実験的に確認できない薄っぺらな理論の域を出ることはなかった」

languages.text: "İşin güzelliği de bu ya... Bilmiyorum!" {n}Eogunn bunu sanki bir şeyi bilmemek, kendisi için merak uyandırıcı bir yenilikmiş gibi keyifle söylüyor.{/n} "Şöyle ki... Bilinmeyen kara taşlardan veya metallerden yapılma, çoğunlukla düzgün biçimli küpler, küreler, silindirler gibi nesneler. Birçoğu, deşifre edilemeyen gliflerle veya desenlerle kaplı. Yıllarca incelediğim ama deneysel olarak doğrulanamayan çürük teorilerin ötesine geçemediğim büyüleyici ıvır zıvırlar işte."
